conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption of PS
conditions.evidence_text: The separation of the polymers was achieved at chromatographic conditions that correspond to the critical point of PS and the size-exclusion mode of PMMA. ... The critical conditions correspond to a mobile phase composition of THF–ACN of 48:52 v/v ... stationary phase: RP-18 Nucleosil 300 û 1000; mobile phase THF/ACN 48:52 v/v; flow rate 0.5 mL min 1; ... at ambient temperature (22 8C).
conditions.notes: PS is chromatographically invisible; PMMA elutes in SEC mode.

conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption of PS
conditions.evidence_text: These critical conditions are used for the analysis of blends of PS and PMMA as well as for PS-b-PMMA copolymers. ... stationary phase: RP-18 Nucleosil 300 û 1000; mobile phase THF/ACN 48:52 v/v; flow rate 0.5 mL min 1
conditions.notes: PS elutes at critical retention time (12.7 min); PMMA elutes in SEC mode.
